title: MagicWand - Building Plugin
description: Real-Time Preview Building Plugin, for Java and Bedrock
body:
[![Join us on Discord](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/discord.svg)](https://discord.gg/t56FghcUWS) [![Read the Documentation](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/docs.svg)](https://magicwand.gitbook.io/magicwand-wiki) [![Support on Patreon](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/patreon.svg)](https://www.patreon.com/c/BryanValc)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c6hVQmQu2aQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Works for any Java and Bedrock client, has 24 brushes, uses WorldEdit/FAWE.

Feature list:
- **Bedrock** support.
- **Java** clients **1.8** to **1.21**.
- Clients **100% vanilla**.
- Blazingly **Fast**.
- Super **Intuitive**.
- **GUI**-Based.
- **Undo** system.
- Limit via LuckPerms.
- Respects **plots**/**regions**.
- [30 FAWE noises](https://app.gitbook.com/o/h3j9uXEh7SECvCoBPbsA/s/6lcEqdz8XwmK79p9ARaN/for-builders/noises)
- **Axiom** compatible (**not** required).

Requires:
- 📦 FastAsyncWorldEdit

Extra Integrations:

- ✅ WorldGuard
- ✅ PlotSquared
- ✅ LuckPerms
- ✅ PlaceholderAPI
- ✅ FancyHolograms
